channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Mistrial declared in federal arson case related to California wildfires
item.description: New trial set to take place in October after jury fails to reach decision in closely-watched case on Palisades Fire.

item.title: Hezbollah will not support Israel-Lebanon framework deal
item.description: Al Jazeera brings you the latest from Beirut as the US announces a framework agreement between Israel and Lebanon.

item.title: After progressive US primary wins, Trump takes aim at ‘godless communists’
item.description: Trump has repeatedly conflated democratic socialists and communists; no communist are running on the Democratic ticket.

item.title: Uruguay vs Spain LIVE: World Cup 2026
item.description: All the updates, with team news coverage and our text commentary stream, as Lamine Yamal's Spain face Uruguay.

item.title: US federal judge questions DOJ decision to drop Adani charges
item.description: Judge says DOJ's reasoning for dropping Adani charges lacks clarity; orders detailed explanation from prosecutors.

item.title: Israeli attack on car in central Gaza kills three Palestinians
item.description: Palestinian Interior Ministry says those killed in attack on Maghazi refugee camp were police officers.

item.title: How much disaster aid will the US provide to Venezuela?
item.description: Powerful back-to-back earthquakes leave behind destruction.

item.title: Trump threatens tariffs for countries that levy digital tax on US firms
item.description: The Republican leader has taken an aggressive stance against countries that weigh taxes or regulations on US tech firms.

item.title: Trump blames Iran for ‘foolish’ strike on cargo ship in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Fragile US-Iran ceasefire tested as drone strike off Oman draws stern warning from the US president.

item.title: Is the AfD a threat to Germany? Mehdi Hasan & Maximilian Krah
item.description: Mehdi Hasan goes head-to-head with German MP Maximilian Krah on the AfD’s hardline immigration agenda

item.title: Israel, Lebanon sign framework deal after US-mediated talks
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio announced a US-mediated framework agreement between Israel and Lebanon.

item.title: Advocates warn of wide-ranging implications of US Supreme Court TPS ruling
item.description: Supreme Court allows Trump to end protected status for Haiti and Syria, threatening family separation say advocates.

item.title: Rescuers race to find survivors of Venezuelan earthquakes
item.description: Rescue teams in Venezuela are racing to find earthquake survivors as the critical 72-hour "golden window" nears.

item.title: Israeli prosecutors charge six settlers after West Bank mosque attack
item.description: Israeli attacks on Palestinian villages have increased in the occupied West Bank, even as settlers charged.

item.title: Why did these World Cup ads strike a nerve in Egypt?
item.description: A viral World Cup campaign tapped into a familiar conversation among Egyptian football fans, prompting debate.

item.title: US announces framework agreement between Israel and Lebanon
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio has announced the deal after talks in Washington, DC, calling it a 'first step'.

item.title: Nine people killed in building collapse in Lagos, Nigeria
item.description: Twenty seven people were rescued with injuries of varying severity; governor orders safety checks on surrounding area.

item.title: New York City freezes rents for one million regulated apartments
item.description: New York City's rent freeze fulfillls a key campaign promise from Mayor Zohran Mamdani

item.title: DR Congo files case against Rwanda at ICJ over decades of alleged ‘abuses’
item.description: Kinshasa takes Kigali to UN's top court over 30 years of alleged massacres, sexual violence, and forced displacement.

item.title: How did Colombia’s election split a nation in two?
item.description: Colombia elected its first right-wing president in years by a razor-thin margin.

item.title: ‘This time’: The World Cup commercials capturing Egypt’s soaring hopes
item.description: The advertisements play on Egypt's poor World Cup record — and the belief that 2026 is different. So far, they ring true

item.title: Hezbollah: Israel must ‘unconditionally’ leave Lebanon
item.description: Hezbollah says Israel has "no option" but to “unconditionally” withdraw from southern Lebanon and other occupied areas.

item.title: Why did these World Cup ads strike a nerve in Egypt?
item.description: Why did these World Cup ads strike a nerve in Egypt?

item.title: Norway vs France LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026
item.description: Follow live updates from the blockbuster clash in Group I - including the build-up, analysis and live text commentary.

item.title: EU targets Somalia with visa curbs as president pushes back on returns
item.description: President says his country will readmit genuine nationals but insists Europe must first verify deportees' identities.
